Status Of Filing Of Receipt And Acknowledgment Of Order For The Deposit Of Money Into Blocked Account
Off Calendar Dec-06-2016 Off Calendar

Status Of Filing Of Receipt And Acknowledgment Of Order For The Deposit Of Money Into Blocked Account
Off Calendar Oct-27-2016 Set For Order To Show Cause On Dec-06-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-15-2016 Off Calendar

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action On Behalf Of Minor
Off Calendar Jul-26-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Julie Conger, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Peter H. Bonis, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff and Petitioner: Peter Wilson, father and guardian ad litem for Minor: Lucia Ferris present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examined.
No appearance by defendant Yuba Bicycles LLC.

After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $30,000.00
Attorney's Fees: $7,500.00 payable to Law Firm of Levin & Hoffmann, LLP
Costs: $13,011.00
A net balance of $16,989.00 to be deposited into a blocked account at:
Redwood Credit Union 1390 Market Street, San Francisco, CA 94102 until Minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Court signed Order Granting approval of Minor. Counsel to submit order to deposit of money into blocked account.
Status Hearing Scheduled on October 27,2016 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt for the deposit of money into blocked account.
No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodged with Dept. 514 prior to Hearing.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-25-2016 Continued To Aug-23-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-08-2016 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Apr-26-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
